name: brand-guidelines
tagline: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and Poppins/Lora typography (with Arial/Georgia fallback) to any artifact being produced.
verdict: Clean, minimal reference doc: fixed hex brand colors, named fonts, and explicit font fallback rules; no shell commands, network calls, or secrets so most security checks are not applicable. Weak spots: no 'NOT for' scope guidance despite a broad description, 'smart color selection based on background' is left undefined (non-deterministic across agents), and.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion language anywhere; description says 'any sort of artifact' with no guidance on when not to apply it.
"Smart color selection based on background" (line 51) names no rule (contrast/luminance) for how the choice is actually made.
"Smart color selection based on background" (line 51) is an undecidable fork — two agents could pick different colors on the same input.
